title: Toward an Antimatter Periodic Table: A Preparedness Framework
description: Version v1.0.1 of a CPT-isomorphic evidence-status and preparedness framework for antimatter. The framework distinguishes experimentally confirmed, theoretically expected, open, and speculative domains and uses the split-cell table as the main representation of the current state of knowledge. Zenodo DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19797170.
